title: The Flag Becomes the Battlefield
description: On pages 19–22, this part focuses on the flag becomes the battlefield, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: The Flag Becomes the Battlefield. Chopper’s grief meets Kureha’s harsh compassion as Hiriluk’s dream becomes a will that Chopper must carry forward. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.
